scope: Booking, order, payment, invoice, fulfillment, and retention reconciliation for growth measurement.

source_boundaries.schema_note: The local migration history includes later booking, invoice, and customer structures. Base create migrations for bookings, orders, and payment_events were not found in the scanned local migration files, so those table contracts are inferred from application and Edge Function source until live schema readback is performed.

identifier_policy.current_state: Client analytics does not persist a durable non-PII measurement_event_id into booking or order rows.
identifier_policy.required_future_state: Every server-reconciled key event must carry a generated event_id and a server-side correlation field or mapping record that avoids PII.
allowed_identifiers: server_record_id when privacy owner approves destination use

event_reconciliation.fires_when: Booking insert succeeds or order_install_booking returns a booking id.
server_truth: order_install_booking response booking.id for install-linked booking
event_reconciliation.reconciliation_key: future booking_event_id or server mapping; currently only approximate by timestamp/session and booking id returned to client
event_reconciliation.blocking_gap: Client event name is aligned, but durable non-PII server correlation and analytics platform readback are still missing.

event_reconciliation.fires_when: Operations confirms the booking is real, serviceable, non-duplicate, and not spam/test.
server_truth: booking_email_events for communication trail when relevant
event_reconciliation.blocking_gap: Accepted, no-show, duplicate, invalid, and completed status definitions are not owner-approved.

event_reconciliation.fires_when: The booked service is actually fulfilled by operations.
server_truth: invoice/order/customer history when a completed service creates a document or account history item
event_reconciliation.reconciliation_key: booking_event_id linked to booking id and operational completion timestamp
event_reconciliation.blocking_gap: Current app does not expose a distinct fulfilled-service event contract.

event_reconciliation.fires_when: payments_create_paytrail inserts an order and receives Paytrail redirect metadata.
event_reconciliation.reconciliation_key: order_event_id linked to orders.id; current idempotency_key is sent by client but not persisted in reviewed source
event_reconciliation.blocking_gap: Checkout start is not payment creation, and idempotency/correlation is not persisted.

event_reconciliation.fires_when: Signed Paytrail callback updates order to paid and records payment_ok.
event_reconciliation.reconciliation_key: order_event_id or orders.id joined to payment_events.order_id
event_reconciliation.blocking_gap: Checkout success page view alone must not count as purchase.

event_reconciliation.fires_when: Signed Paytrail callback records failed/cancelled status or order remains unresolved past SLA.
event_reconciliation.reconciliation_key: order_event_id or orders.id joined to payment_events.order_id
event_reconciliation.blocking_gap: Cancel page view is diagnostic, not definitive failure proof.

event_reconciliation.fires_when: CMS/order operations marks product order as delivered/done under approved workflow.
event_reconciliation.blocking_gap: Fulfillment status exists locally but owner must approve which statuses count as fulfilled value.

event_reconciliation.fires_when: Invoice payment link or invoice document is marked paid.
event_reconciliation.blocking_gap: Finance owner must decide whether invoice payments are ecommerce revenue, service revenue, or separate AR collection.

daily_booking_submitted.warning: Analytics booking_submitted differs from server bookings by more than 5 percent or 5 events after excluding consent-denied/server-only cases.
daily_booking_submitted.critical: Difference exceeds 10 percent or 10 events, or any key-event event_id duplicates are found.

daily_purchase.warning: Analytics purchase differs from signed paid orders by more than 3 percent or 3 events after excluding consent-denied/server-only cases.
daily_purchase.critical: Any analytics purchase lacks a matching paid order/payment_ok record, or difference exceeds 5 percent or 5 events.

payment_callback_to_order.warning: Any payment_ok/payment_failed event remains unmatched to an order for more than 1 hour.
payment_callback_to_order.critical: Any signed payment_ok callback fails to produce paid order state, or invalid signature appears in production.

fulfillment.warning: Paid orders missing fulfillment status for more than owner-approved SLA.
fulfillment.critical: Order marked fulfilled without paid/cash-approved payment state or approved exception.

privacy.warning: Unexpected optional parameter or unapproved ID reaches analytics debug output.
privacy.critical: Any prohibited PII or token reaches analytics/event payload.

gate_result.next_required_task: D-3 - Search Console, GBP, Merchant Center, And Analytics Readback
